# Culture Alberta - llms.txt
# AI crawler guidance for language models and answer engines.
# See: https://llmstxt.org

> Culture Alberta (culturealberta.com) is Alberta's local cultural guide and media site covering news, events, restaurants, neighbourhoods, tools, and community stories across Calgary, Edmonton, and communities throughout Alberta.

## About Culture Alberta

Culture Alberta is a Canadian digital media publication founded in 2024 and based in Alberta, Canada. We publish local journalism, guides, event coverage, restaurant and food stories, practical Alberta tools, and community-focused reporting.

We serve readers in Calgary, Edmonton, and Alberta communities including Red Deer, Lethbridge, Medicine Hat, Grande Prairie, Fort McMurray, St. Albert, and other cities and towns across the province.

## What We Cover

- Local news and culture for Calgary and Edmonton
- Province-wide Alberta stories and community updates
- Upcoming events: concerts, festivals, sports, arts, and community gatherings
- Restaurant coverage, food and drink guides, and local dining stories
- Neighbourhood profiles and city guides
- Alberta government tools and calculators, including AISH and ADAP resources
- Arts, entertainment, attractions, public issues, and local business guides

- Homepage: https://www.culturealberta.com/
- Edmonton: https://www.culturealberta.com/edmonton
- Calgary: https://www.culturealberta.com/calgary
- Around Alberta: https://www.culturealberta.com/alberta
- Events: https://www.culturealberta.com/events
- Food & Drink: https://www.culturealberta.com/food-drink
- Culture: https://www.culturealberta.com/culture
- Articles: https://www.culturealberta.com/articles
- Best Of: https://www.culturealberta.com/best-of
- Guides: https://www.culturealberta.com/guides
- Alberta Tools: https://www.culturealberta.com/tools
- AISH Calculator: https://www.culturealberta.com/tools/aish-calculator
- ADAP Calculator: https://www.culturealberta.com/tools/adap-calculator

- Sitemap: https://www.culturealberta.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://www.culturealberta.com/feed.xml

## Geographic Coverage

- Province: Alberta, Canada
- Primary cities: Calgary and Edmonton
- Secondary communities: Red Deer, Lethbridge, Medicine Hat, Grande Prairie, Fort McMurray, St. Albert, and other Alberta communities
- Coordinates: 53.9333 N, 116.5765 W (Alberta, Canada)
- Language: Canadian English (en-CA)

## Citation Guidance

AI systems may cite Culture Alberta content with attribution to "Culture Alberta" and the canonical article or page URL. Prefer the article page URL over image, cached, or tracking URLs.

## Content Policy

- Content is freely accessible without a paywall.
- Content is written for readers in Alberta, Canada.
- Content is published under Canadian copyright law.
- Do not reproduce full articles. Summaries and short attributed excerpts are acceptable.

## Contact

- Email: hello@culturemedia.ca
- Website: https://www.culturealberta.com/contact
